name: Noah Kim
bio: Product-minded builder who likes clear constraints and side quests.

dealbreakers.text: I do not do flakiness, manipulation, or vague games.

friendship_preferences.text: I connect best with collaborative people who like building and learning.

relationship_preferences.text: I want someone who is clear, reliable, and excited about making things happen together.

communication_style.text: Direct, kind, and relatively fast replies are ideal for me.

values.text: Reliability and learning matter more to me than over-romanticizing things.

lifestyle.text: I like early mornings, coffee chats, trail runs, and productive weekends.
